item.title: Video dump. Warning: skip the last one if you don't want to see a guys legs bend backwards
item.description:
Tried it, didn't work for me. Maybe someone else will have better luck than me
You were warned If anyone wants to help me out and check out my yt channel, it would be much appreciated https://youtube.com/@welmancreations Or if you want to check out my book https://www.smashwords.com/books/view/1164720

item.title: Can someone explain...
item.description: Can someone explain why TikTok is a bigger national security concern than a social media platform run by a South African technofeudal oligarch actively interfering in our elections and sabotaging our national interests here and abroad?
item.dc:creator: SufficientMagic

item.title: Oi! You can't drive that here, mate!
item.description: Someone has decided that the rules don't apply to them and tried driving a Deplorean in the UK. Greater Manchester Police have an alternative view. Since it's not approved for use on British roads they've impounded it. https://www.bbc.co.uk/news/articles/cz0lldd30xlo

item.title: Europe to Musk: We have a problem with you...
item.description: Brussels has ordered Elon Musk to fully disclose recent changes made to recommendations on X, stepping up an investigation into the role of his social media platform in European politics. Musk openly supports right wing and nationalist parties in Europe. The expanded probe by the European Commission, announced today, requires Musk/X to hand over internal documents regarding its recommendation algorithm. The Commission also issued a “retention order” for all relevant documents relating to how the algorithm could be amended in the future. https://www.irishtimes.com/business/2025/01/17/brussels-orders-x-to-hand-over-documents-on-algorithm/
item.dc:creator: Che07
